title: Alaipayuthey
desc: After eloping and getting married to each other by going against their families, a couple realises that living in a marriage is not as simple as it seems.

title: Naan E
desc: Nani loves Bindu but is killed by a jealous businessman, Sudeep, who lusts over Bindu. Nani is reincarnated as a fly and decides to avenge his death and make Sudeep's life a living hell.

title: Perarsu
desc: CBI officer Kasi gets tasked to investigate the disappearance of a judge. However, when he finds the culprits, who are three corrupt policemen, they get killed one by one and Kasi gets framed for it.

title: Bloody Beggar
desc: A lazy man parades around as a beggar with false ailments, and he chances upon an opportunity to infiltrate a rich household. But he doesn't realise that he's walked into a web of conspiracies.

title: Nannbenda
desc: When Sathya's girlfriend is threatened to be killed by a goon, him and his friend Siva decide to beat him up. But when the goon dies in an accident, the two friends are accused of murder.
